overall.description: Game engine footage from a ship simulator showing a first-person view from the vessel's bridge during nighttime navigation. The player monitors radar and navigation displays while cruising through coastal waters, with weather conditions deteriorating to a lightning storm toward the end of the clip.

agents.ego_description: piloting the ship from the bridge, monitoring radar and chart displays while maintaining course through calm night waters

entered.detail: electronic chart display showing yellow landmasses and vessel position on blue water background
circular radar display with rotating yellow sweep showing navigation targets and range rings
blue depth sounder display showing underwater terrain profile with depth readings
forward deck of the vessel with red navigation lights and metal railings
metal safety railing on the port side of the forecastle deck
metal safety railing on the starboard side of the forecastle deck
dark calm water extending to the horizon under night sky

segments.scene_description: The view from inside a ship's bridge at night, looking forward over the bow. Three navigation monitors display chart, radar, and depth information while the vessel cruises steadily through calm dark waters. The interior is lit by the glow of the displays, and red navigation lights are visible on the deck below.

events.description: bright lightning flash appears on the port side, illuminating the ocean surface and indicating storm conditions

agents.ego_description: continuing to pilot the ship as lightning strikes nearby, maintaining course through the deteriorating weather

entered.detail: bright electrical discharge illuminating the ocean surface and clouds on the port side

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to storm conditions as lightning strikes illuminate the ocean surface on the port side. The ship continues moving forward through the rougher seas, with the bright flashes of lightning contrasting against the dark night sky and the steady glow of the bridge monitors.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as a calm nighttime cruise transforms into a volatile lightning storm. It begins with a steady view over the bow, where the interior is dimly lit by the glow of three navigation monitors displaying radar and depth information. As the vessel cruises through dark, still waters, the scene shifts toward the port side where the atmosphere grows turbulent. The calm environment then gives way to rougher seas, punctuated by sudden, bright flashes of lightning that illuminate the ocean surface against the dark sky. The shot concludes with these stark electrical bursts contrasting against the persistent, steady light of the bridge displays.
